column1: validation
if user profile is updated, then report handler is notified.
if report handler receives a report, then data manager is updated.
if data manager receives data, then web server is updated.
if web server receives a request, then database is updated.
if database is updated, then data manager is updated.
if data manager is updated, then notification system is notified.
if notification system is notified, then achievements are updated.
if achievements are updated, then user profile is updated.
if user profile is updated, then authentication system is updated.

l'utente deve prima autenticarsi: if the user is not authenticated, request authentication
